subject: (no subject)
body:
Hi Jeffrey

Sorry for my previous email, I was just upset that you have had to go through all of this over the past few years as I think you are such a great person.

I just wanted you to know that I will always be your friend and care about you very much.

Hope you have a lovely day.

Lots of love
Juliette
